description: Must_push channel with 10 signal aliases and zero conflicts — clean learning candidate for routing accuracy.

expected.reason: 10 unambiguous signals on must_push channel with zero conflicts. Ideal routing accuracy training case.

description: Watch channel with 5 signal aliases and no conflicts — watch_only because channel strength is inherently monitoring.

expected.reason: Watch channel routing with five signals. Correct handling for low-urgency monitoring classification.

description: Review channel with 8 signals and one conflict resolved — learning candidate for conflict resolution path.

expected.reason: Single conflict on review channel with 8 total signals. Well-formed case for conflict resolution taxonomy.

description: Must_push channel with 15 signals and zero conflicts — high-volume positive example for routing coverage.

expected.reason: 15 fresh alias signals with no conflicts. Strong must_push routing example for benchmark coverage.

description: Watch channel with 3 signals and one conflict — watch_only since channel is already in monitoring posture.

expected.reason: Watch channel with minimal signals and one conflict. Monitoring posture is appropriate; conflict is noted.

description: NEGATIVE: Must_push channel but half of signals are conflicting — routing decision is unreliable, review required.

expected.reason: 4 of 8 signals are conflicting on must_push channel. High false positive risk; human review needed before routing is trusted.

description: NEGATIVE: Zero signal aliases on must_push channel — no basis for routing decision, rejected.

expected.reason: Zero signals on must_push channel. No evidentiary basis for routing; decision is invalid and must be rejected.

description: NEGATIVE: All signals are conflicting on review channel — routing is completely ambiguous, must be rejected.

expected.reason: All 6 signals are conflicting. Routing classification is fully ambiguous and cannot be used as a training case.
